title: [Bug]: podman completion does not work for Powershell
body:
### Issue Description

`podman completion powershell | Out-String | Invoke-Expression` fails with Podman 4.3.1

> Line |
  13 |  [scriptblock]$__podman.exeCompleterBlock = {
     |  ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
     | The property 'exeCompleterBlock' cannot be found on this object. Verify that the property exists and can be set.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. podman completion powershell | Out-String | Invoke-Expression


### Describe the results you received

 Line |
  13 |  [scriptblock]$__podman.exeCompleterBlock = {
     |  ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
     | The property 'exeCompleterBlock' cannot be found on this object. Verify that the property exists and can be set.

### Describe the results you expected

Podman completion successfully added.

comments.body: see #16499 and https://github.com/spf13/cobra/issues/1853, this must be fixed in cobra
